event: Portrait of Count St. Genois d'Anneaucourt
description: A portrait in the New Objectivity style showing a man in a black tuxedo with a white shirt, black bow tie, and white pocket square, standing between two fashionably dressed women. The man has a narrow face, slicked dark hair, and looks directly at the viewer. To his left, a woman in a green satin dress is partially visible in profile. To his right, a woman in a sheer pink or salmon dress is shown from behind, her face turned to the side. Behind the figures, a stylized cityscape of rooftops, chimneys, and Parisian-style buildings fills the background in muted tones.
